projects.title: AI Facebook Page Agent
projects.description: An autonomous AI agent that monitors Facebook page messages, comments, and mentions — responding intelligently, routing leads, and escalating complex queries to human agents in real-time.

projects.title: Dental Clinic Automation
projects.description: Complete automation suite for a dental clinic: appointment scheduling, patient reminders via WhatsApp/SMS, post-treatment follow-ups, and monthly reporting — saving 40+ staff-hours weekly.

projects.title: Lead Generation Workflow
projects.description: Multi-channel lead capture and qualification pipeline. Automatically scores leads using AI, enriches contact data, routes hot leads to sales teams via Slack, and triggers personalized email sequences.

projects.title: Customer Support AI Agent
projects.description: 24/7 AI-powered support agent that handles tier-1 tickets autonomously, retrieves order information from APIs, processes refund requests, and seamlessly hands off complex cases with full context.
